creator: flz@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

The x11/xorg port is a meta port to get a working xorg quickly.  The 
modularity should be in the sub-meta ports. xorg-drivers is already done 
and I'm willing to accept a solution for xorg-apps as long as it doesn't 
involve adding each component in OPTIONS.  As for fonts, I guess I could 
just add OPTIONS.
